text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ohh, look at you, brooding all on your lonesome.
Started indulging in grown-up hobbies?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Is that something adults do for fun?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Beats me. ☆

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: So? What's eating you on this final day of camp?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um... I was just reflecting on a lot of things, like
how tough training was...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
The aches in my joints won't go away, and my
body just feels really weird recently...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Okay. And?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Still, Trainer is working really hard for my sake,
and things have gotten much easier than they
used to be.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
They always keep an eye out for me, and they
notice even the smallest changes.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm always on the receiving end of their support
and encouragement...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Sounds like you found yourself a considerate
partner.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I did!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Back when we first met, I really just wanted to
make myself useful in any way I could.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But now... I think the real reason Trainer came
into my life was for my sake.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I can continue to give it my all each and every
day because my trainer is there with me.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Could be.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I want to show my appreciation by winning the
Sprinters Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I know you can do it, Flower. Think about how
much you put into this.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...You'll definitely win.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I appreciate that, Sky.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Also... I have noticed, you know!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hm? Noticed what?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
That there's someone else who's been watching
over me, always ready to pick me up when I'm
feeling down.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
That person is really kind, and has always stayed
close by my side...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
They're a protector from above, beautiful and
serene, just like...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'm heading back now! What about you, Sky?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...This could be our last time here, so I think I'll
watch the waves a bit longer.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Okay! See you tomorrow, then!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: She really has grown up so fast...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: No fair...

text_block_list.name: Flower's Friend A
text_block_list.text: Oh, Flower! You came at the perfect time!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hm? Why is everybody gathered here?

text_block_list.name: Flower's Friend B
text_block_list.text:
We're comparing our heights before going back
to the academy. Look at that pillar!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
...Wow! There are so many lines! Are these all
from past students?

text_block_list.name: Flower's Friend B
text_block_list.text:
Looks like it. I asked the staff here, and
apparently the owner of the building lets
Umamusume use this pillar!

text_block_list.name: Flower's Friend A
text_block_list.text: Come on, Flower! I'll measure you!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: O-okay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With our second summer camp in the books, I'm
waiting for Nishino Flower so that we can board
the bus together when...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: T-Trainer! Big news!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I've grown a bit taller!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! Who knows, I might shoot up ten
centimeters by next summer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her physical changes had her at a loss at first, but
after realizing they were something to celebrate,
she's been able to take them in stride.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's grown so much compared to when we first
met, and she'll soon stand shoulder to shoulder
with the older students she looks up to.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I can't wait to compete in the Sprinters Stakes! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the curtain falls on our second summer camp, I
have a hunch that Nishino Flower will continue to
grow in both mind and body at a swift pace.
